content.title: English Teacher & Coach
content.copy: Move your life forward with better English. I am an award-winning teacher with a background in Linguistics and product design. I provide straightforward, high-level instruction for people who are serious about their progress.

eiken.student: I need help with my Eiken score!
eiken.juan: No problem. Let's build a system.

travel.student: I'm traveling to London next month!
travel.juan: Exciting! Let's prep your travel English.

business.student: I have a big presentation on Friday.

test_taker.title: The Test-Taker
test_taker.description: Preparing for Eiken, TOEFL, or TOEIC? I help you bridge the gap between knowing grammar and hitting your target score. I’ve helped students secure the scores they needed to move abroad and change their lives.

professional.title: The Professional
professional.description: High-stakes meetings or international presentations? I’ve taught at global companies like Fujitsu and Hino. We refine your professional voice so you can lead with confidence in any corporate environment.

explorer.title: The Expat
explorer.description: Moving abroad or living in a new country? I know the isolation of the language barrier. I focus on practical communication and the cultural nuance you need to actually feel at home anywhere in the world.

next_gen.title: The Academic
next_gen.description: For University students and researchers. Drawing on my history tutoring graduate students and professors, I help you master the high-level English required for academic success and international research.

hobbyist.title: The Lifelong Learner
hobbyist.description: Learning for the sake of mastery? You don’t need English for a job, but you’re serious about the craft. I help you treat language as a project, focusing on the logic and systems that make fluency a rewarding intellectual pursuit.

framework.title: My 5-Point System
framework.subtitle: A complete approach for serious students.

step1.title: The Diagnostic Audit
step1.label: Point 01
step1.description: We don't do generic placement tests. I analyze your current speech and writing to find the specific bottlenecks holding you back from the next level.

step2.title: Linguistic Logic
step2.label: Point 02
step2.description: I use my background in Linguistics to explain the 'why' behind the language. Once you understand the system, you stop memorizing and start communicating.

step3.title: High-Stakes Prep
step3.label: Point 03
step3.description: We focus on the moments that matter. Whether it's a TOEFL exam, a corporate presentation, or a visa interview, we build the exact tools you need to succeed.

step4.title: Cultural Nuance
step4.label: Point 04
step4.description: English is more than just words. I teach you the social 'unwritten rules' and pragmatics I've learned from living and working in global environments.

step5.title: The Work Loop
step5.label: Point 05
step5.description: I provide direct, honest feedback. We iterate on your progress with the same intensity I bring to my own work. No fluff—just steady, measurable growth.

hiroki.name: Satoshi M.
hiroki.story: Six months before moving to the U.S., I needed to improve my TOEIC score and prepare for daily life. Juan prepped me for everything—from the test to social nuances. Two years later, I still see the impact of that training.

elena.name: Mina K.
elena.story: I needed a specific TOEFL score to study abroad. After several attempts on my own, I worked with Juan and passed on my first try after only three months. He helped me make my goal of moving abroad a reality.

kenji.name: Dr. Park
kenji.story: During my sabbatical at UCSD, Juan pushed my English in a way that was challenging but highly effective for my research. Despite our different backgrounds, he understood exactly how to help me adjust and grow.

saki.name: Takumi O.
saki.story: I used to be very shy and worried about my grammar. Juan helped me realize that English is about communication and personality. Now, I'm the one making jokes and leading conversations in group settings.

language_friends.title: Language Friends Series
language_friends.desc: A series of books designed for natural language acquisition through storytelling.
language_friends.details: Language Friends is a children's book series launched on Amazon. Drawing on my background in linguistics, these stories focus on natural acquisition patterns rather than rote memorization. They are built to help young learners (and parents) engage with English through high-interest narratives and clear visual systems.

yt_challenge.title: Juan & Moe's Language Switch
yt_challenge.desc: Real-time language challenges and breakdown scripts. Seeing the system in action.
yt_challenge.details: This YouTube channel documents a real-time language challenge with my wife. We document the struggle, the systems, and the breakthroughs of learning in a bilingual environment. It provides students with a look at how a high-agency approach to language actually works in daily life.

english_lab.title: The English Lab (Official)
english_lab.desc: Deep dives into the linguistics and systems behind high-speed language acquisition.
english_lab.details: The English Lab is where I break down the mechanics of English. I move away from 'classroom' English and focus on the systems—phonology, syntax, and pragmatics—that allow adults to communicate at a professional level quickly.

portfolio.title: Product & UX Portfolio
portfolio.desc: The architectural thinking applied to digital products, now applied to language.
portfolio.details: My work as a Product Designer and Systems Architect. This portfolio showcases how I solve disorganized problems through structured, usable, and scalable digital solutions. I apply this same 'Systems First' mindset to how I teach English.

behance.title: Behance Case Studies
behance.desc: Visual breakdowns of design systems and brand identities created over the last decade.
behance.details: A collection of visual design systems and brand identities. These case studies highlight my focus on information architecture and the visual communication strategies I've used for various global clients.

medium.title: Medium Blog
medium.desc: Articles on UX, pedagogy, and the intersection of systems architecture and life.
medium.details: I write about the intersection of design, language, and logic. My articles explore how we can use architectural thinking to improve our learning habits, our work-flows, and our ability to communicate complex ideas.

contact.title: Let’s talk about your English.
contact.subtitle: Tell me where you’re currently stuck and what you want to achieve.

placeholders.name: Your Name
placeholders.message: What are your goals or current challenges with English?

identity.bio: I live and work on the coast of Ishikawa. I use my background in UX design and linguistics to help professionals communicate clearly and confidently. No fluff—just practical tools to help you get your point across.

footer.mission: Breaking down language systems to help professionals communicate with clarity and confidence. From UX design to high-agency coaching.
